---
title: "What am I doing right now?"
date-modified: last-modified
---

<br/>

## Teaching

🗣 African American English (as [LING 495R Senior Capstone](https://catalog.byu.edu/courses/12295-001))

<!--
* 🗣️ Varieties of English ([ELING 468](https://catalog.byu.edu/courses/11256-002))

* 🛠 Linguistics Tools ([LING 240](https://catalog.byu.edu/courses/12290-000)) 

* 🎙️ Applied Phonetics ([ELING 327](https://catalog.byu.edu/courses/11232-001_)

* 🗣️ Sociolinguistics ([LING 452](https://catalog.byu.edu/courses/12546-000))
-->

## Research

<!--* 👨🏻‍🏫 Preparing an abstract for NWAV54.-->

<!--* 💬 Collecting data on language attitudes towards regional varieties of English.-->

* 📃 Working on revising and resubmitting a manuscript.

<!--* 📊 Analyzing... -->

<!--* 📚 Reading... -->

<!--* 🤔 Thinking about what I'd like to get done in a potential sabbatical next year.-->

* 🇬🇧 Starting some preliminary plans for co-directing a study abroad in the UK next summer.

* 🛠 Developing some pretty awesome new tools for sociophonetic data analysis. Stay tuned! 



## Advising

* ⛪️ An MA thesis on how religiosity correlates with language attitudes towards Spanish-accented English.

* ️🎤 An MA thesis on the acoustic correlates of "hero" and "villain" in voice actors. 

* 🗣️ An MA project that produces materials for Swahili speakers to learn English.

* ️🧑‍🧑‍🧒‍🧒 An MA thesis on address forms for in-laws and other non-core family members.

* 🎤 A [HumGrant](https://humgrants.byu.edu) on the social perception of affricate closure duration in Utah English.

* 👩🏼‍🤝‍👩🏻 A [HumGrant](https://humgrants.byu.edu) on the effect of pitch on the perceptions of female voices.



## Personal

* 🏡 Getting ready to move!

<!--* 📊 Working on a few analyses for my [HymnStats blog](https://hymnstats.joeystanley.com).-->

* 📘 Listening to Timothy Zahn's *Thrawn*. (This is my first foray into extra-canonical Star Wars books!)

* 🎶 Taking organ lessons and working on some foundational techniques. (This is my first time taking music lessons since 2011!)

* 🧶 Knitting a red scarf with a pretty cool Japanese cable pattern.

* 🧩 Toying around with 3x3, 5x5, and 7x7 Rubik's cubes.

* 📺 Watching *Abbott Elementary* and the latest season of *Taskmaster*.
